meta.name: Hack4Sages Mars ejecta simulation
meta.description: Solar System plus nearby Gaia stars and Mars ejecta propagated with REBOUND.

fieldDescriptions.objects.id: Stable identifier for a simulated object (sun, planet, star or asteroid).
fieldDescriptions.objects.name: Human-readable name of the object.
fieldDescriptions.objects.status: Object status for visualization: static, traveling, escaped_and_travelling, destroyed or arrived.
fieldDescriptions.objects.visual: Default visual settings for the object (radius and color in the viewer).
fieldDescriptions.objects.info: Additional information fields shown in the UI (mass, radius, rock type, etc.).
fieldDescriptions.frames.step: Simulation step index for this frame.
fieldDescriptions.frames.positions: List of object positions in this frame.
fieldDescriptions.frames.positions.x: X coordinate [AU] in the simulation frame.
fieldDescriptions.frames.positions.y: Y coordinate [AU] in the simulation frame.
fieldDescriptions.frames.positions.z: Z coordinate [AU] in the simulation frame.
fieldDescriptions.frames.velocities: List of object velocities in this frame.
fieldDescriptions.frames.properties: Per-object physical properties in this frame.
fieldDescriptions.frames.properties.mass: Object mass [kg] (physical mass for stars/planets, asteroid mass from state).
fieldDescriptions.frames.properties.radius: Object radius [m] (physical radius or asteroid radius).
fieldDescriptions.frames.properties.beta: Radiation-pressure beta parameter for the body (dimensionless), if available.
fieldDescriptions.frames.properties.status: Object status in this frame (static, traveling, escaped_and_travelling, destroyed, arrived).
fieldDescriptions.frames.properties.termination_reason: Reason why an asteroid became inactive, if any.
fieldDescriptions.frames.properties.termination_star_index: Index of the star that captured/destroyed the asteroid, if applicable.
fieldDescriptions.frames.aggregates: Frame-level global aggregates over all asteroids.
fieldDescriptions.frames.aggregates.asteroid_count: Number of active asteroids in this frame.
fieldDescriptions.frames.aggregates.escaped_and_travelling: Number of asteroids that have escaped the Solar System (escaped_and_travelling status).
fieldDescriptions.frames.aggregates.destroyed_count: Number of asteroids that are inactive due to destruction, including collisions with stars.
fieldDescriptions.frames.aggregates.arrived_count: Number of asteroids that have arrived in the effective Hill sphere of a non-Sun star.
fieldDescriptions.frames.aggregates.total_population_fract: Sum of surviving population fractions over all active asteroids.
fieldDescriptions.frames.aggregates.time_years: Simulation time for this frame [yr] (duplicate of frames.time for convenience).
fieldDescriptions.frames.aggregates.uv_local_flux_sum: Sum of UV flux at microbe locations over all reported bodies [W/m^2].
fieldDescriptions.frames.aggregates.gcr_local_flux_sum: Sum of cosmic ray flux at microbe locations over all reported bodies (model units).
fieldDescriptions.frames.aggregates.gamma_local_flux_sum: Sum of gamma-ray flux at microbe locations over all reported bodies [W/m^2].
fieldDescriptions.frames.aggregates.T_surface_K_min: Minimum surface temperature among reported bodies [K].
fieldDescriptions.frames.aggregates.T_surface_K_mean: Mean surface temperature among reported bodies [K].
fieldDescriptions.frames.aggregates.T_surface_K_max: Maximum surface temperature among reported bodies [K].
fieldDescriptions.frames.aggregates.T_center_K_min: Minimum center temperature among reported bodies [K].
fieldDescriptions.frames.aggregates.T_center_K_mean: Mean center temperature among reported bodies [K].
fieldDescriptions.frames.aggregates.T_center_K_max: Maximum center temperature among reported bodies [K].
fieldDescriptions.frames.aggregates.total_erosion_mass_los: Total cumulative mass lost to dust erosion across all active asteroids [kg].
fieldDescriptions.frames.aggregates.total_asteroid_mass_kg: Total mass of all active asteroids in this frame [kg].
